claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.rolePolicy: Centering never infers dialog, region, or presentation semantics.

layout.intrinsic: Flex centering consumes only available space and sets no fixed dimensions.
layout.maximum: Direct children use min(100%, semantic maximum) to remain inside narrow containers.
layout.overflow: Neither axis clips content; expanded text increases block size.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide a meaningful block-size constraint only when block-axis centering is actually intended.
Do not center long prose text unless centered reading alignment is a deliberate content choice.
Keep focused descendants unobscured when combining Center with sticky or overlay content.
